criteria.rule: hardware parity can mature exactly the pending event it scheduled

summary.claim_boundary: Prepared source bundle only; no hardware parity evidence until returned run-hardware artifacts pass.
summary.next_step_if_passed: Run the emitted EBRAINS command and ingest returned files.
summary.what_i_need_from_user: Upload the generated cra_422t folder to EBRAINS/JobManager and run the emitted command; download returned files after completion.
